pkgmetadata.longdescription:
NewTek (Vizrt) NDI SDK runtime — libndi.so for sending and receiving NDI video over IP. Proprietary; the installer must be downloaded manually from ndi.video after accepting the SDK License Agreement, then placed in DISTDIR.
Consumed at runtime via dlopen by clients such as media-plugins/gst-plugin-ndi. The ebuild wires NDI_RUNTIME_DIR_V6=/opt/ndi/lib into /etc/env.d/99ndi so dlopen consumers find the library without per-shell setup.
